extract.name: Private Training
extract.tagline: Train your whole team, shipping real work.
extract.summary: Private Training is a closed, 12-week custom engagement that trains up to 8 operators from a single company as Shift U Certified Operators while shipping 4 to 7 production automations live inside the client's own stack. It is the one-team alternative to the mixed-company public cohort, with side-by-side build days led by Marcus and a 30-day post-handover support window.
extract.pricing: $22,500 CAD per engagement. Public cohort comparison: $7,500 per operator (8 weeks).
included: Up to 8 operators from one company trained as Shift U Certified Operators
4 to 7 production automations live inside the client's stack
12-week custom engagement mapped to your workflows
Operator friction map covering every role in scope
Top 6 automation candidates with hour-savings projections
keyPoints: Core promise: A private engagement is the only way to move a whole team off manual at once. We do not lecture, we sit beside operators and ship work that lasts.
Phase 1 (Weeks 1-3): Discovery and workflow mapping with on-site interviews
Phase 2 (Weeks 4-5): Foundations and tool stack training
Phase 4 (Weeks 11-12 + 30 days): Handover, certification, and support window

Private vs public comparison: closed cohort with one team only vs mixed companies; 12 weeks vs 8 weeks; 4 to 7 production automations shipped vs 1 capstone per operator; side-by-side build days vs group sessions
proof: 100 percent Operator Certification Pass: every completing operator earns the credential, with free remediation sessions available if needed
Zero Bottleneck Promise, 30 days after handover: direct Marcus access, with a credit issued if workflows stall beyond one business day
faq: Public cohort vs private engagement - Cohort: mixed companies (public) vs closed, one team only (private)
Automations shipped: 1 capstone per operator (public) vs 4 to 7 production automations (private)
Facilitator time: group sessions (public) vs side-by-side build days (private)
extract.capgRemoved: Stripped all government grant/funding framing from the source page. Removed verbatim: the stated net-after-grant price ("about $7,650 CAD based on the 66 percent CAJG reimbursement"); "The Canada-Alberta Job Grant covers up to 66 percent of AI training, with up to $10,000 per trainee per year."; "CAJG eligible for the full 66 percent"; "66 percent reimbursed, up to $10,000 per trainee per year"; "the grant covers 66 percent of training, up to $10,000 per trainee per year, funded through 2028"; "CAJG-eligible programs"; the included deliverable "CAJG application packet sent to finance team (within 24 hours)"; and the inquiry-form requirement "Open to applying for the Canada-Alberta Job Grant." The Canada-Alberta Job Grant / CAJG was referenced 5+ times. Kept the real service and its true full price of $22,500 CAD per engagement; only the grant-funding wrapper and the discounted net price were removed.
